sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67718" key="mikrokamph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρο-καμπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n67718.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a small bend, much bent</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl>(?)ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:18:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.18.5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
